# SopKit

> SopKit is a free online toolkit with browser-based tools for image, PDF, video, audio, text, SEO, and developer workflows. No signup required. Privacy-first — most tools process data locally in the browser.

Canonical: https://sopkit.github.io
Search: https://sopkit.github.io/search
Sitemap: https://sopkit.github.io/sitemap.xml
RSS: https://sopkit.github.io/feed.xml

## What is SopKit?

SopKit is a comprehensive collection of free online utilities for creators, developers, students, and professionals. All tools run in the browser without account creation or software installation. Files processed client-side never leave the device.

## Category hubs

- [Fun Generators](https://sopkit.github.io/generators) - Create viral content with AI-powered fun generators
- [Company](https://sopkit.github.io/about) - 
- [Blog](https://sopkit.github.io/blog) - Tech blog and tool deep-dives
- [Calculators](https://sopkit.github.io/calculators) - Calculate academic grades, attendance shortage, and construction materials with ease.
- [Exam Image & Form Tools](https://sopkit.github.io/exam-tools) - Resize and compress photos, signatures, and PDFs to fit exact official requirements for UPSC, SSC, NEET, JEE, and other major exams.
- [Health & Fitness](https://sopkit.github.io/calculators) - Calculate BMI, BMR, TDEE, and other health metrics to stay on track with your fitness goals.

## Tools by category

### Fun Generators

- [AI Image Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/ai-image-generator) - Generate stunning AI images from text prompts instantly. Create photorealistic photos, digital art, anime, and illustrations for free. No signup required, unlimited generations, and 100% private browser-based processing.
- [AI Voice Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/ai-voice-generator) - Convert text to natural-sounding AI voices instantly. Our free text-to-speech tool offers multiple languages and accents for professional voiceovers, accessibility, and creative projects. No signup required.
- [AI Music Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/ai-music-generator) - Generate full-length AI songs with vocals and instrumentation from text prompts using MiniMax Music 2.6 on Cloudflare AI. Royalty-free music generation with studio-grade quality. Free this week!
- [QR Code Reader](https://sopkit.github.io/qr-code-reader) - Scan and decode QR codes from images or using your camera online for free. Secure, browser-based QR reader with instant results and no data storage.
- [Bio Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/bio-generator) - Create professional and aesthetic bios for social media profiles.
- [Business Name Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/business-name-generator) - Generate creative and catchy names for your brand or startup.
- [AI Poem Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/ai-poem-generator) - Create beautiful poems, haikus, and rhymes using artificial intelligence.
- [Fake Chat Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/fake-chat-generator) - Create realistic-looking fake chat screenshots for WhatsApp, Discord, and iMessage.
- [Excuse Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/excuse-generator) - Generate creative excuses for any situation.
- [Font Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/font-generator) - Professional Font Generator tool for free online use.
- [Number Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/number-generator) - Professional Number Generator tool for free online use.
- [Poetry Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/poetry-generator) - Professional Poetry Generator tool for free online use.
- [Rent Receipt Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/rent-receipt-generator) - Generate HRA-compliant rent receipts online for free. Fill in tenant, landlord, and rent details, and download print-ready receipts instantly.
- [Simple Invoice Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/simple-invoice-generator) - Create and print professional billing invoices online. Add custom line items, tax, discount details, and generate print-ready PDF layouts instantly.
- [Leave Application Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/leave-application-generator) - Draft professional leave applications for office, school, or college online. Customize dates, reason, and print or copy instantly.
- [Resignation Letter Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/resignation-letter-generator) - Generate professional resignation letters in seconds. Choose between formal, polite, or short-notice templates and print or download instantly.
- [Bio Data Maker](https://sopkit.github.io/bio-data-maker) - Create beautiful marriage biodata sheets or professional resumes. Upload photos, input family or job details, and print a custom layout.
- [Instagram Bio Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/instagram-bio-generator) - Generate optimized instagram bio generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Instagram Caption Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/instagram-caption-generator) - Generate optimized instagram caption generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Hashtag Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/hashtag-generator) - Generate optimized hashtag generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Slogan Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/slogan-generator) - Generate optimized slogan generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Logo Idea Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/logo-idea-generator) - Generate optimized logo idea generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [GBP Description Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/google-business-profile-description-generator) - Generate optimized gbp description generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Review Reply Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/review-reply-generator) - Generate optimized review reply generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Menu Description Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/restaurant-menu-description-generator) - Generate optimized menu description generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Client Proposal Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/client-proposal-generator) - Generate optimized client proposal generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Payment Reminder Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/payment-reminder-generator) - Generate optimized payment reminder generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Product Description Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/product-description-generator) - Generate optimized product description generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [Refund Policy Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/refund-policy-generator) - Generate optimized refund policy generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.

### Image Tools

- [SVG to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/svg-to-png) - Convert scalable vector graphics (SVG) into high-quality PNG images with transparent backgrounds.
- [WEBP to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/webp-to-png) - Convert modern WEBP images to widely supported PNG format without losing quality.
- [ICO to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/ico-to-png) - Extract PNG images from ICO icon files. Perfect for web developers and designers.
- [JPG to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-png) - Convert JPG photos to PNG format to support transparency and lossless compression.
- [PNG to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-jpg) - Convert PNG images to JPG format for smaller file sizes and web optimization.
- [SVG to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/svg-to-jpg) - Convert SVG vector files into standard JPG images with custom background colors.
- [WEBP to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/webp-to-jpg) - Convert WEBP files to JPG format for compatibility with all devices and platforms.
- [Advanced Favicon Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/favicon-generator-pro) - Create all required favicon sizes and formats (ICO, PNG, SVG) for modern web projects from one image.
- [Image Metadata (EXIF) Remover](https://sopkit.github.io/remove-image-metadata) - Remove sensitive GPS, camera, and author metadata from your images before sharing online.
- [Pro Image Color Picker](https://sopkit.github.io/image-color-picker) - Extract HEX, RGB, and HSL color codes from any image with our interactive pixel-perfect picker.
- [Compress Image to Exact KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-exact-kb) - Compress JPG, PNG, or WebP images to exact KB sizes like 10KB, 20KB, 50KB, 100KB, and 200KB online for free.
- [Resize Image in CM, MM, Inches](https://sopkit.github.io/resize-image-cm-mm-inch) - Resize photos by centimeters, millimeters, inches, pixels, and DPI for official forms, printing, and documents.
- [Passport Photo Maker India](https://sopkit.github.io/passport-photo-maker-india) - Create passport-size photos for Indian forms with crop, background, size, and print layout options online for free.
- [Aadhaar and PAN Card Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/aadhaar-pan-photo-resizer) - Resize and compress photos and signatures for Aadhaar, PAN card, KYC, and online document forms.
- [Background Remover](https://sopkit.github.io/background-remover) - Remove image backgrounds automatically with AI. Create transparent PNGs for product photos, headshots, or graphics instantly. 100% free, browser-based, and no signup needed.
- [Base64 to Image Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/base64-to-image-converter) - Convert Base64 strings to images (PNG, JPG, WebP) instantly. Our privacy-first tool processes data locally in your browser, ensuring your images stay secure. Free and fast Base64 decoder.
- [Convert to ICO](https://sopkit.github.io/convert-to-ico) - Free convert to ico tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [EXIF Reader](https://sopkit.github.io/exif-reader) - Extract metadata and EXIF data from images including camera settings and GPS location
- [Favicon Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/favicon-generator) - Generate favicons from text, images, or emojis for websites
- [Flip Image](https://sopkit.github.io/flip-image) - Free flip image tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [ICO to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/ico-to-png-converter) - Free ico to png converter tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [Image Compressor](https://sopkit.github.io/image-compressor) - Compress images online for free without losing quality. Reduce file size of JPG, PNG, and WebP images instantly. Secure, browser-based processing.
- [Image Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/image-converter) - Convert images between any format (PNG, JPG, WEBP, BMP, GIF, SVG) online for free. Fast, high-quality conversion with batch support and 100% privacy.
- [Image Cropper](https://sopkit.github.io/image-cropper) - Free image cropper tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [Circular Image Crop](https://sopkit.github.io/circular-image-crop) - Crop images into perfect circular shapes online. Ideal for profile pictures and social media avatars.
- [Image Watermark Adder](https://sopkit.github.io/image-watermark) - Add text or image logo watermarks to your pictures. Customize opacity, size, positioning, and rotation to protect your images online.
- [GIF Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/gif-generator) - Compile multiple images into an animated GIF client-side. Control delay/interval and image dimensions easily.
- [Image Enlarger](https://sopkit.github.io/image-enlarger) - Free image enlarger tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [Image Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/image-resizer) - Resize images with custom dimensions and aspect ratios
- [Image to Base64 Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/image-to-base64) - Free image to base64 converter tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-converter) - Convert photos and images to JPG format instantly. Our free online JPG converter maintains high visual quality while optimizing file size for web use. Privacy-focused and works entirely in your browser.
- [JPG to BMP Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-bmp-converter) - Convert JPG images to BMP (Bitmap) format for legacy system compatibility. Fast, free, and secure online converter that works in your browser without uploading files to any server.
- [JPG to GIF Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-gif-converter) - Turn your JPG photos into GIF format instantly. Perfect for simple animations or platform-specific requirements. Free, secure, and privacy-friendly online image converter.
- [JPG to ICO Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-ico-converter) - Convert JPG images to ICO favicon files for your website. Our free tool creates high-quality icons in multiple sizes for perfect browser compatibility. No signup required.
- [JPG to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-png-converter) - Convert JPG to PNG with transparency support. Maintain high image quality and convert formats instantly in your browser. Free, secure, and privacy-focused online tool.
- [JPG to WebP Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/jpg-to-webp-converter) - Convert JPG to WebP for superior web performance. Reduce file sizes significantly without losing quality. Our free online converter helps you speed up your website instantly.
- [Logo Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/logo-generator) - Create professional logos with text, fonts, and custom colors
- [Photo Enhancer](https://sopkit.github.io/photo-enhancer) - Enhance photo quality with AI-powered image enhancement
- [PNG to BMP Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-bmp-converter) - Convert PNG images to BMP format instantly. Our free online converter preserves original quality while ensuring compatibility with legacy software. Fast, secure, and privacy-focused.
- [PNG to GIF Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-gif-converter) - Convert PNG photos to GIF format instantly. Perfect for web graphics and simple animations. Free, secure, and works entirely in your browser without file uploads.
- [PNG to ICO Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-ico-converter) - Generate high-quality ICO favicon files from PNG images. Our free tool supports multiple sizes for perfect website icon compatibility. Privacy-first browser-based conversion.
- [PNG to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-jpg-converter) - Convert PNG images to JPG format for smaller file sizes and better web compatibility. Our free online tool maintains high quality and works instantly in your browser.
- [PNG to WebP Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/png-to-webp-converter) - Convert PNG to WebP to optimize your website speed. Significantly reduce file sizes while maintaining image transparency and quality. Free, fast, and secure online tool.
- [Rotate Image](https://sopkit.github.io/rotate-image) - Rotate images clockwise, counter-clockwise, or flip them instantly. Our free online image rotator works in your browser, keeping your photos private and secure. No signup needed.
- [WebP to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/webp-to-jpg-converter) - Convert WebP images to JPG format for maximum compatibility across all devices and platforms. Our free online converter is fast, secure, and preserves image detail.
- [WebP to PNG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/webp-to-png-converter) - Convert WebP to PNG to restore transparency and compatibility with all image editors. High-quality, free, and privacy-focused online conversion tool.
- [Free Image Tools Online](https://sopkit.github.io/image-tools) - Browse our collection of free online image tools. 100% free, no signup required, and privacy-focused.
- [Icon Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/icon-generator) - Generate app icons and favicons for Android, iOS, and web applications.
- [Image Editor](https://sopkit.github.io/image-editor) - Edit, crop, and enhance your photos online with our free image editing tools.
- [Compress Image to 20KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-20kb) - Compress any image file (JPG, PNG, WebP) to fit strictly under 20KB while maintaining the best possible visual clarity.
- [Resize Image in CM](https://sopkit.github.io/resize-image-in-cm) - Resize your images by specifying width and height in centimeters (cm), millimeters (mm), or inches for printing and forms.
- [Compress Image to 10KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-10kb) - Compress any image file (JPG, PNG, WebP) to fit strictly under 10KB while maintaining the best possible visual clarity.
- [Compress Image to 30KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-30kb) - Compress any image file (JPG, PNG, WebP) to fit strictly under 30KB while maintaining the best possible visual clarity.
- [Compress Image to 100KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-100kb) - Compress any image file (JPG, PNG, WebP) to fit strictly under 100KB while maintaining the best possible visual clarity.
- [Compress Image to 200KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-image-to-200kb) - Compress any image file (JPG, PNG, WebP) to fit strictly under 200KB while maintaining the best possible visual clarity.
- [Resize Image in MM](https://sopkit.github.io/resize-image-in-mm) - Resize your images by specifying width and height in millimeters (mm) for printing, exam forms, and documents.
- [Resize Image in Pixels](https://sopkit.github.io/resize-image-in-pixels) - Resize your images by specifying exact width and height in pixels (px) for web, social media, and digital platforms.
- [Image DPI Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/image-dpi-converter) - Change or convert your image's DPI (Dots Per Inch) to 300, 600, or custom values for official applications and printing.

### Text Tools

- [Text Reverser](https://sopkit.github.io/text-reverser) - Flip your text backwards or reverse the order of words instantly for creative projects and coding.
- [Remove Duplicate Lines](https://sopkit.github.io/remove-duplicate-lines) - Clean up your lists and data by automatically removing identical lines of text. Fast and private.
- [Markdown to HTML Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/markdown-to-html) - Convert Markdown text into clean HTML code for your website, blog, or email newsletters.
- [Markdown to PDF Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/markdown-to-pdf) - Convert Markdown text into a clean, print-ready PDF document instantly.
- [URL Encoder Decoder](https://sopkit.github.io/url-encoder-decoder) - Encode or decode your URLs and URL query parameters instantly. 100% private.
- [String Length Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/string-length-calculator) - Get detailed string analytics including character, word, byte, and line counts instantly.
- [Text to Binary/Hex/Octal Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/text-to-binary-hex-octal) - Convert plain text strings to binary, hex, and octal formats simultaneously. 100% local.
- [Slug to Text Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/slug-to-text-converter) - Convert URL slugs with hyphens or underscores back into clean, readable text strings.
- [Word Frequency Counter](https://sopkit.github.io/word-frequency-counter) - Calculate word density, occurrences, and text analytics with a sorted frequency table.
- [Case Converter (Sentence, Upper, Lower)](https://sopkit.github.io/case-converter) - Change the case of your text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Sentence case, or Title Case instantly.
- [Emoji Text Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/emoji-text-generator) - Add fun emojis to your text or convert words into emoji-rich messages for social media.
- [Random Word Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/random-word-generator) - Generate random words for creative writing, brainstroming, or educational games.
- [Resume ATS Score Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/resume-ats-score-checker) - Check your resume ATS score, keyword match, formatting issues, missing skills, and job-fit suggestions instantly. Free resume checker for students and professionals.
- [Resume Keyword Matcher](https://sopkit.github.io/resume-keyword-matcher) - Match your resume with a job description and find missing skills, keywords, tools, and role-specific terms to beat the ATS.
- [Cover Letter Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/cover-letter-generator) - Generate a personalized cover letter for internships, fresher jobs, remote jobs, and startup roles in seconds. Professional and ready to edit.
- [LinkedIn Headline Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/linkedin-headline-generator) - Create professional LinkedIn headlines that stand out. Generate multiple variations for developers, students, freelancers, and marketers.
- [Internship Application Message Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/internship-message-generator) - Generate short, human internship messages for LinkedIn, email, and founder outreach. Perfect for students and freshers.
- [Article Rewriter](https://sopkit.github.io/article-rewriter) - Paraphrase and rewrite articles instantly with our free online Article Rewriter. Improve readability, change tone, and create unique content variations for blogs and SEO. 100% free and secure.
- [Comma Separator](https://sopkit.github.io/comma-separator) - Convert lists, columns, or text into comma-separated values (CSV) instantly. Our free online Comma Separator is perfect for data cleaning and formatting tasks. Privacy-focused browser tool.
- [Line Sorter](https://sopkit.github.io/line-sorter) - Sort lists, names, or lines alphabetically or by length instantly. Our free online Line Sorter helps you organize data for cleaner documentation and code. Privacy-friendly and fast.
- [Lorem Ipsum Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/lorem-ipsum) - Generate custom Lorem Ipsum text for your designs.
- [Number to Word Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/number-to-word-converter) - Convert numbers to words instantly with our free online converter. Perfect for writing checks, legal documents, or educational purposes. Supports multiple formats and large numbers.
- [Random Word Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/random-word-generator) - Generate random words instantly for creative writing, brainstorming, or vocabulary practice. Our free online tool offers customizable options for word type and quantity. Fun and fast.
- [Remove Line Breaks](https://sopkit.github.io/remove-line-breaks) - Remove line breaks, carriage returns, and extra whitespace from your text instantly. Perfect for cleaning up copied content for clean formatting. Free and privacy-focused online tool.
- [Text Compare](https://sopkit.github.io/text-compare) - Compare two text snippets side-by-side to find differences instantly. Our free online Text Compare tool highlights additions, deletions, and changes with high precision. Secure and browser-based.
- [Text Repeater](https://sopkit.github.io/text-repeater) - Repeat any text as many times as you need with our free online Text Repeater. Perfect for testing, social media, or fun content. Simple, fast, and works instantly in your browser.
- [Text Sorter](https://sopkit.github.io/text-sorter) - Organize your lists and text lines with our free online Text Sorter. Sort alphabetically, by length, or reverse order instantly. Privacy-focused tool for researchers and developers.
- [Text to Hashtags Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/text-to-hashtags-converter) - Convert your text into trending hashtags for social media instantly. Our free tool helps you optimize posts for Instagram, TikTok, and Twitter with relevant, search-friendly tags.
- [Text to Slug Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/text-to-slug-converter) - Transform any text or title into a URL-friendly slug instantly. Perfect for SEO-friendly web development, blog posts, and clean link structures. Free and fast online tool.
- [Text to Tags Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/text-to-tags-converter) - Extract and generate relevant meta tags from your text instantly. Our free online converter helps you create SEO tags, HTML keywords, and header tags for better web visibility.
- [Word Counter](https://sopkit.github.io/word-counter) - Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs in your text instantly. Our free online Word Counter also provides estimated reading time and text analysis. Fast and private.
- [Word to Number Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/word-to-number-converter) - Convert words into digits instantly with our free online Word to Number converter. Perfect for data entry, educational exercises, and technical documentation cleanup.
- [Markdown to Text](https://sopkit.github.io/markdown-to-text) - Convert Markdown formatted text to clean plain text instantly. Perfect for cleaning up content from ChatGPT, Claude, and GitHub.
- [Kruti Dev to Unicode Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/kruti-dev-to-unicode) - Convert legacy Kruti Dev 010 font layout text to standard Unicode Devanagari Hindi text dynamically.
- [Unicode to Kruti Dev Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/unicode-to-kruti-dev) - Convert standard Unicode Devanagari Hindi text to legacy Kruti Dev 010 font layout text dynamically.
- [Hinglish to Hindi Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/hinglish-to-hindi) - Convert phonetic Hinglish (Roman English) text into standard Unicode Hindi (Devanagari) dynamically.
- [Hindi Typing Tool](https://sopkit.github.io/hindi-typing-tool) - Type in English and get it transliterated to Hindi in real-time. Free online Devanagari phonetic Hindi typing utility.

### PDF Tools

- [Compress PDF to Exact KB](https://sopkit.github.io/compress-pdf-to-exact-kb) - Compress PDF files to exact sizes like 100KB, 200KB, 500KB, or custom KB for forms and uploads online.
- [Remove Pages from PDF](https://sopkit.github.io/remove-pages-from-pdf) - Delete unwanted pages from a PDF file online. Select pages, remove them, and download a clean PDF for free.
- [PDF to JPG Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-to-jpg-converter) - Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG images online. Download each page as an image or ZIP file.
- [Merge PDF Online](https://sopkit.github.io/merge-pdf-online) - Combine multiple PDF files into one document. Reorder files and download a merged PDF instantly.
- [HTML to PDF Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/html-to-pdf) - Convert HTML code or files to print-ready PDF documents client-side instantly.
- [PDF Compressor](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-compressor) - Compress PDF documents to reduce file size while maintaining original print quality.
- [PDF Page Numbers Adder](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-page-numbers) - Add page numbers to your PDF documents easily. Customize positioning, font size, and start index.
- [PDF Watermark Creator](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-watermark) - Add text or image logos as watermarks to all pages of your PDF document securely in your browser.
- [PDF Metadata Editor](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-metadata-editor) - Edit PDF document metadata including Title, Author, Subject, and Keywords online for free.
- [PDF Merger](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-merger) - Combine multiple PDF documents into a single file quickly. Reorder files and merge instantly.
- [PDF Splitter](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-splitter) - Split PDF documents by page ranges or extract individual pages into separate PDF files.
- [PDF Rotation Tool](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-rotation) - Rotate single or all pages of a PDF document to landscape or portrait orientation instantly.
- [Image to PDF](https://sopkit.github.io/image-to-pdf) - Convert multiple images to a single PDF document 100% free. Supports JPG, PNG, WEBP and more. Privacy-first local processing with no signup required.
- [PDF Editor](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-editor) - Professional PDF editor - edit text, add annotations, rotate, and delete pages online for free. Secure, 100% browser-based PDF editing with no signup.
- [PDF Password Protect](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-protect) - Secure your PDF files with strong password encryption online for free. Privacy-first local processing ensures your sensitive documents never leave your browser.
- [PDF to Image](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-to-image) - Convert PDF pages to high-quality JPG, PNG images
- [PDF to Word](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-to-word) - Convert PDF files to editable Word documents
- [PDF Unlocker](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-unlocker) - Remove password protection from PDF files
- [Word to PDF](https://sopkit.github.io/word-to-pdf) - Convert Word documents (.docx) to high-quality PDF files online for free. Privacy-first, browser-based conversion with no signup required.
- [PDF Grayscale](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-grayscale) - Convert color PDF documents to black and white (grayscale) online for free. Reduce file size and save ink with our secure, browser-based PDF converter. No signup required.
- [PDF Repair](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-repair) - Fix corrupted or broken PDF files online for free. Our secure repair tool rebuilds document headers and cross-reference tables to restore access to your PDF documents instantly.
- [PDF Tools](https://sopkit.github.io/pdf-tools) - Merge, split, compress, and manipulate PDF documents

### Video Tools

- [Video Tools](https://sopkit.github.io/video-tools) - Compress videos, convert formats, and create GIFs
- [Video Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/video-converter) - Convert video files between MP4, AVI, MKV, MOV, and more.
- [Video Editor](https://sopkit.github.io/video-editor) - Edit, cut, and merge video files online for free.
- [Akillitv Video Downloader](https://sopkit.github.io/akillitv-video-downloader) - Free, high-speed online downloader to save and download media content from platforms using the Akillitv Video Downloader. No registration, 100% secure client-side browser processing.

### YouTube Tools

- [YouTube Channel Age Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-channel-age-checker) - Find the exact creation date of any YouTube channel with our free online Age Checker. Perfect for creator research, account verification, and competitive analysis. Fast and private.
- [YouTube Channel Finder](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-channel-finder) - Discover YouTube channels by keyword, category, or topic instantly. Our free online Channel Finder helps you research competitors and find inspiration for your next video project.
- [YouTube Channel ID Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-channel-id-extractor) - Extract the unique Channel ID from any YouTube URL instantly. Perfect for developer API calls, marketing automation, and third-party tool integrations. Free and fast online tool.
- [YouTube Playlist Link Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-playlist-link-extractor) - Extract all video URLs, IDs, titles, and publish dates from any public YouTube playlist. Free online playlist extractor for creators, marketers, and researchers.
- [YouTube Channel Statistics](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-channel-statistics) - Get detailed insights and statistics for any YouTube channel instantly. View subscriber counts, video totals, and engagement metrics with our free online analytics tool.
- [YouTube Comment Picker](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-comment-picker) - Pick a random winner from your YouTube video comments instantly. Our free online Comment Picker is perfect for giveaways, contests, and audience engagement. Fast and fair.
- [YouTube Description Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-description-extractor) - Extract the full description from any YouTube video instantly. Perfect for competitor research, SEO analysis, and content archiving. Free and secure online tool.
- [YouTube Embed Code Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-embed-code-generator) - Generate customizable YouTube embed codes instantly. Our free online tool helps you create responsive iframes with specific start times, player controls, and privacy settings for your website.
- [YouTube Hashtag Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-hashtag-extractor) - Extract all hashtags from any YouTube video instantly. Our free online tool helps you analyze competitor tagging strategies and optimize your own video SEO for better reach.
- [YouTube Hashtag Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-hashtag-generator) - Generate viral hashtags for your YouTube videos instantly. Our free online tool suggests relevant, search-friendly tags to help you reach more viewers and boost engagement.
- [YouTube Money Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-money-calculator) - Estimate potential earnings for any YouTube video or channel with our free online Money Calculator. Understand revenue based on views, CPM, and engagement metrics. Perfect for creators.
- [YouTube Region Restriction Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-region-restriction-checker) - Check if a YouTube video is blocked or restricted in specific countries instantly. Our free online tool helps you verify global availability for your content. Fast and accurate.
- [YouTube Subscribe Link Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-subscribe-link-generator) - Create a direct YouTube subscribe link for your channel instantly. Our free online tool helps you boost your subscriber count with one-click links for social media and bios.
- [YouTube Tag Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-tag-extractor) - Extract hidden tags from any YouTube video instantly. Our free online tool helps you discover the keywords used by top-performing creators to boost your own video SEO.
- [YouTube Tag Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-tag-generator) - Generate SEO-friendly tags for your YouTube videos instantly. Our free online tool suggests relevant keywords based on your video topic to help you rank higher in search results.
- [YouTube Timestamp Link Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-timestamp-link-generator) - Create direct links to specific parts of any YouTube video instantly. Our free online tool helps you share precise moments with friends, students, or your audience. Fast and easy.
- [YouTube Title Extractor](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-title-extractor) - Extract the exact title from any YouTube video instantly. Perfect for competitor research, SEO analysis, and content archiving. Free and secure online tool.
- [YouTube Title Length Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-title-length-checker) - Check if your YouTube video title is the optimal length for search and browse. Our free online checker helps you avoid truncation and ensure your full title is visible in search results.
- [YouTube Video Count Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-video-count-checker) - Get the exact video count for any YouTube channel instantly. Our free online checker provides up-to-date information for competitive research and channel auditing.
- [YouTube Video Statistics](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-video-statistics) - Get detailed metrics and statistics for any YouTube video instantly. Analyze view counts, likes, and engagement rates with our free online video audit tool.
- [Youtube Video Title Capitalizer](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-title-capitalizer) - Automatically capitalize your YouTube video titles for maximum professional impact and CTR. Our free online tool follows industry standards to make your titles stand out.
- [YouTube Views Ratio Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-views-ratio-calculator) - Calculate the view-to-engagement ratio for any YouTube video instantly. Our free online tool helps you understand audience interaction and video performance beyond just views.
- [YouTube Title Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-title-generator) - Generate optimized youtube title generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.
- [YouTube Description Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/youtube-description-generator) - Generate optimized youtube description generator details. Instantly copy or share customized outputs.

### Developer Tools

- [UUID/GUID Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/uuid-generator) - Generate unique UUID v4 and GUID strings instantly for your applications and databases.
- [URL Slug Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/slug-generator) - Convert any text into a SEO-friendly URL slug. Perfect for blog posts and web pages.
- [JSON to TypeScript Interface](https://sopkit.github.io/json-to-typescript) - Convert JSON objects into clean TypeScript interfaces or type definitions automatically.
- [SQL Formatter & Beautifier](https://sopkit.github.io/sql-formatter) - Format and beautify your SQL queries for better readability. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, and more.
- [HTML Minifier](https://sopkit.github.io/html-minifier) - Compress and minify your HTML code instantly by removing comments and extra whitespace.
- [User Agent Parser](https://sopkit.github.io/user-agent-parser) - Parse any User Agent string to detect Browser, OS, and Engine details instantly.
- [YAML to JSON Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/yaml-to-json-converter) - Convert YAML configurations to clean JSON structures instantly. Safe & secure.
- [JSON to YAML Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/json-to-yaml-converter) - Convert JSON configurations to clean YAML structures instantly. Safe & secure.
- [HTML to XML Entities Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/html-to-xml-entities) - Convert HTML special characters into safe XML entities and display tags securely online.
- [CSS Border Radius Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/css-border-radius-generator) - Generate CSS border-radius rules interactively with live shape previews and webkit/moz prefixes.
- [Crontab Expression Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/crontab-generator) - Easily create and validate cron job expressions with our interactive visual generator.
- [XML Formatter & Beautifier](https://sopkit.github.io/xml-formatter) - Clean and format messy XML data into a readable hierarchical structure.
- [HTML Entity Encoder/Decoder](https://sopkit.github.io/html-entity-encoder) - Encode or decode HTML entities to prevent XSS or display special characters safely.
- [Random Name Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/random-name-generator) - Generate random names for characters, personas, or test data with gender and niche options.
- [Binary to Hex Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/binary-to-hex-converter) - Convert binary strings to hexadecimal values and vice versa instantly.
- [JWT Decoder & Debugger](https://sopkit.github.io/jwt-decoder) - Decode JSON Web Tokens (JWT) locally in your browser to inspect header, payload, and signature.
- [Amazon SES API Key Tester](https://sopkit.github.io/api-key-tester/amazon-ses) - Test your Amazon SES credentials with the send email endpoint.
- [Anthropic Claude API Key Tester](https://sopkit.github.io/api-key-tester/anthropic) - Test your Anthropic Claude API key with the messages endpoint.
- [ASCII to Binary Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/ascii-to-binary-converter) - Convert ASCII text to binary code instantly. Our free online converter is perfect for computer science students, developers, and hobbyists. Fast, secure, and browser-based.
- [ASCII to Text Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/ascii-to-text-converter) - Convert ASCII character codes back to readable text instantly. Our free online tool makes it easy to decode ASCII sequences for development and debugging tasks.
- [Attio API Key Tester](https://sopkit.github.io/api-key-tester/attio) - Test your Attio API key with the records endpoint.
- [Binary to ASCII Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/binary-to-ascii-converter) - Transform binary code (0s and 1s) into readable ASCII text instantly. Our free online converter is fast, accurate, and works entirely in your browser. No signup required.

### Utility Tools

- [Adsense Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/adsense-calculator) - Free adsense calculator tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [Age Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/age-calculator) - Free age calculator tool to process your data instantly with privacy-friendly browser-based workflows.
- [Angle Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/angle-converter) - Convert between degrees, radians, gradians, and more instantly. Our free online Angle Converter is perfect for students, engineers, and mathematicians. Fast and accurate.
- [Apparent Power Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/apparent-power-converter) - Convert between volt-amperes (VA), millivolt-amperes, and more instantly. Our free online tool is perfect for electrical engineers and technicians.
- [Area Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/area-converter) - Convert between square meters, square feet, acres, and more instantly. Our free online Area Converter is perfect for real estate, construction, and design projects.
- [Average Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/average-calculator) - Calculate the mean, median, mode, and range of any dataset instantly. Our free online Average Calculator helps you analyze statistics and numeric data in seconds.
- [Base64 Decode](https://sopkit.github.io/base64-decode) - Decode Base64 strings back to their original plain text instantly. Our privacy-first tool processes everything in your browser, ensuring your data never leaves your device.
- [Base64 Encode](https://sopkit.github.io/base64-encode) - Encode plain text into Base64 format instantly. Our free online tool is perfect for developers, data transmission, and secure character representation in web URLs.
- [Charge Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/charge-converter) - Convert between coulombs, millicoulombs, and other electrical charge units instantly. Our free online tool provides quick and accurate physics base transformations.
- [Color Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/color-converter) - Transform color codes between HEX, RGB, HSL, and CMYK formats instantly. Our free online tool helps designers and developers manage color schemes with precision.
- [Confidence Interval Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/confidence-interval-calculator) - Calculate the confidence interval for your statistical data instantly. Our free online tool helps you understand data precision and margin of error in your research.
- [Convert SRT to VTT](https://sopkit.github.io/convert-srt-to-vtt) - Convert subtitle files from SRT to VTT format instantly. Our free online tool ensures compatibility with web-based video players and modern streaming platforms.
- [Convert VTT to SRT](https://sopkit.github.io/convert-vtt-to-srt) - Convert subtitle files from VTT to SRT format instantly. Our free online tool makes it easy to use web captions with traditional desktop video players.
- [CPM Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/cpm-calculator) - Calculate Cost Per Mille (CPM) for your advertising campaigns instantly. Our free online tool helps marketers and creators understand their ad spend and reach efficiency.
- [Credit Card Generator](https://sopkit.github.io/credit-card-generator) - Generate valid dummy credit card numbers for software testing and data validation. Our free online tool provides numbers that pass Luhn algorithm checks without being real cards.

### Calculators

- [Roman Numerals Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/roman-numerals-converter) - Convert numbers to Roman numerals and vice versa instantly. Supports large numbers and historical formats.
- [Number to Words Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/number-to-words-converter) - Convert any number into words (English, Indian numbering system) for cheques, invoices, and documents.
- [Date Difference Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/date-difference-calculator) - Calculate the exact duration between two dates in years, months, weeks, days, hours, and minutes.
- [Working Days Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/working-days-calculator) - Calculate the number of working days or business days between two dates, excluding weekends and holidays.
- [GPA to 4.0 Scale Converter](https://sopkit.github.io/gpa-to-4-scale-converter) - Convert your Indian percentage or 10-point CGPA into the standard US 4.0 GPA scale for study abroad.
- [Recurring Deposit (RD) Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/rd-calculator) - Calculate the maturity amount and interest earned on your monthly Recurring Deposit (RD) investments.
- [Gratuity Calculator (India)](https://sopkit.github.io/gratuity-calculator) - Estimate your gratuity amount based on your last drawn salary and years of service in India.
- [EPF Calculator (Employee Provident Fund)](https://sopkit.github.io/epf-calculator) - Calculate your EPF maturity amount based on your basic salary, monthly contribution, and current interest rate.
- [Invoice Generator India with GST](https://sopkit.github.io/invoice-generator-india) - Create professional invoices for Indian freelancers and businesses with GST, discounts, and PDF download for free.
- [GST Calculator India](https://sopkit.github.io/gst-calculator-india) - Calculate GST amount, inclusive/exclusive price, CGST, SGST, and IGST for Indian invoices instantly.
- [EMI Calculator for Loans](https://sopkit.github.io/emi-calculator) - Calculate monthly EMI, total interest, and repayment amount for home loans, car loans, and personal loans.
- [SIP Calculator India](https://sopkit.github.io/sip-calculator) - Calculate estimated SIP returns and wealth growth for mutual fund investments online for free.
- [FD Calculator India](https://sopkit.github.io/fd-calculator-india) - Calculate fixed deposit maturity amount and interest with quarterly compounding for Indian banks.
- [Salary Calculator India (CTC to In-Hand)](https://sopkit.github.io/salary-calculator-india) - Calculate your monthly in-hand salary from annual CTC with PF, professional tax, and income tax deductions.
- [CGPA to Percentage Calculator for Indian Universities](https://sopkit.github.io/cgpa-to-percentage-calculator-india) - Convert your CGPA into percentage using common Indian university formulas like CBSE 9.5x, VTU, Mumbai University, DU, AKTU, and Anna University.
- [SGPA to CGPA Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/sgpa-to-cgpa-calculator) - Calculate your cumulative GPA (CGPA) from semester-wise SGPA values. Supports credit-weighted and simple average methods.
- [Attendance Shortage Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/attendance-shortage-calculator) - Calculate how many classes you need to attend to reach 75% attendance or how many classes you can safely miss.
- [Exam Marks Needed Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/marks-needed-calculator) - Find out exactly how many marks you need in your final exam to pass or reach your target grade based on internal scores.
- [75% Attendance Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/75-attendance-calculator) - Calculate how many classes you need to attend or can safely skip to maintain a minimum 75% attendance rate.
- [SGPA Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/sgpa-calculator) - Compute your Semester Grade Point Average (SGPA) based on course credits and grade points earned.
- [CGPA Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/cgpa-calculator) - Calculate your Cumulative Grade Point Average (CGPA) from semester-wise SGPA or grade points.
- [CGPA to Percentage Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/cgpa-to-percentage-calculator) - Convert your CGPA to equivalent percentage marks using standard university formulas (like CBSE 9.5x).
- [Required Marks Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/required-marks-calculator) - Find out exactly how many marks you need to score in your final exam to achieve your target grade or pass.
- [Brick Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/brick-calculator) - Calculate the total number of bricks, cement bags, and sand volume required for building a wall.
- [Paint Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/paint-calculator) - Estimate the amount of paint in liters and estimated cost needed to cover walls, rooms, or ceilings.
- [Tile Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/tile-calculator) - Calculate the total number of floor or wall tiles needed for a room, including waste margins and cost estimates.
- [Compound Interest Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/compound-interest-calculator) - Calculate compound interest and future value with regular contributions. See how your savings or investments grow over time, free and instant.
- [Mortgage Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/mortgage-calculator) - Estimate your monthly mortgage payment, total interest, and total cost from home price, down payment, rate, and term. Free, no signup.
- [Car Loan Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/car-loan-calculator) - Work out your monthly car payment and total interest from vehicle price, down payment, trade-in, APR, and term. Free auto loan calculator.
- [ROI Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/roi-calculator) - Calculate return on investment, net gain, and annualized ROI from your initial and final values. Free investment return calculator.
- [Savings Goal Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/savings-goal-calculator) - Find the monthly deposit needed to reach a savings goal by a target date, including interest. Free savings planning calculator.
- [Tip Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/tip-calculator) - Calculate the tip, total, and amount per person for any bill. Quick gratuity and bill-splitting calculator, free and no signup.
- [BMI Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/bmi-calculator) - Calculate your Body Mass Index from height and weight and see your BMI category. Free, private BMI calculator that runs in your browser.
- [Fuel Cost Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/fuel-cost-calculator) - Estimate the fuel needed and total cost for a trip from distance, fuel economy, and price per litre. Free trip fuel cost calculator.
- [Inflation Calculator](https://sopkit.github.io/inflation-calculator) - See how inflation changes the value of money over time, including future buying power and the nominal amount needed to keep pace. Free tool.

### Exam Image & Form Tools

- [SSC Photo and Signature Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/ssc-photo-signature-resizer) - Resize and compress SSC photo (20-50KB) and signature (10-20KB) online for government exam forms. 100% compliant with SSC requirements.

- [UPSC Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/upsc-photo-resizer) - Resize your photo and signature to meet the exact dimensions (350x350 pixels) and file size (20KB - 300KB) specified for UPSC IAS/IFS application forms.
- [SSC Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/ssc-photo-resizer) - Resize and compress SSC photos to 350x450 pixels and 20KB-50KB, plus resize signatures to 10KB-20KB. No signup required.
- [Signature Resizer Under 20KB](https://sopkit.github.io/signature-resizer-under-20kb) - Resize and compress signatures under 20KB for exam forms, job applications, and government portals. Free browser-based signature compressor.
- [NEET Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/neet-photo-resizer) - Resize and compress NEET application photos and signatures for online form uploads. Free, private, and no signup required.
- [JEE Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/jee-photo-resizer) - Prepare JEE Main photo and signature images for online application forms with browser-based resize and compression.
- [CUET Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/cuet-photo-resizer) - Resize CUET photos and signatures for application forms using a free browser-based image resizer and compressor.
- [Railway Exam Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/railway-exam-photo-resizer) - Resize photos and signatures for railway exam forms, including RRB and recruitment portal uploads.
- [Bank Exam Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/ibps-photo-resizer) - Resize and compress photos and signatures for IBPS, SBI, and bank exam application forms.
- [PAN Card Photo Resizer](https://sopkit.github.io/pan-card-photo-resizer) - Resize PAN card photos and signatures for online application forms with safe browser processing.
- [Passport Photo Maker India](https://sopkit.github.io/passport-photo-maker) - Create passport-style photos for Indian forms and documents with crop, resize, and compression controls.
- [Photo Compressor Under 50KB](https://sopkit.github.io/photo-compressor-under-50kb) - Compress exam photos under 50KB for application forms while keeping face details readable.
- [Form Image Size Checker](https://sopkit.github.io/form-image-size-checker) - Check image dimensions, file size, format, and DPI before uploading photos or signatures to online forms.
- [Photo Name Date Editor](https://sopkit.github.io/photo-name-date-editor) - Add name and date text to exam photos when an application form requires it.
